data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Spotify encrypts data both in transit and at rest to protect user information and proprietary data.
data.technical_spec: Uses Transport Layer Security (TLS) and AES encryption standards.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
data.description: Adds an extra layer of security to user accounts to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Optional MFA implementation using mobile or email-based verification.

data.title: Security Threat Detection
data.description: Monitors for unauthorized access or breaches using AI-driven security tools.
data.technical_spec: Employs behavioral analytics and intrusion detection systems.

data.title: Regulatory Compliance
data.description: Adheres to data protection regulations like GDPR to maintain user privacy.
data.technical_spec: Implements processes for data management and breach notification requirements.

data.title: Vulnerability Management Program
data.description: Regularly scans and patches vulnerabilities in the application network and infrastructure.
data.technical_spec: Uses automated security scanning tools and periodic security audits.
